Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_HERO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After summoning a Persona, power within gradually enhances.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After healing someone, her desire to prevent death strengthens.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After landing a critical hit, he becomes motivated by his own potential.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_SANADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After strengthening himself, his fighting spirit rises.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_MITURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After weakening enemies or inflicting an ailment, her will burns brighter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After analyzing an enemy, her yearning for her friends' trust grows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After using physical skills, her drive to complete her mission intensifies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_AMADA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Once his SP is less than half, his competitiveness is incited.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_KOROMA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After exploiting an enemy's weakness, his will to fight grows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_ARAGAK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Once his HP is less than half, his determination ignites.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_METIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After being Shifted to from Aigis, her drive to protect her sister rises.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TheurgiaFlavorMSG_HEROAE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After summoning a Persona, power within gradually enhances.[n]{f 1 1}
